# INDIVIO EDTECH — MASTER CONTEXT DOCUMENT

> This document is the single source of truth for the entire Indivio project.
> Last updated: March 2026 · Version: 1.0 · Phase: V1 Development

---

## 0. HOW TO USE THIS DOCUMENT

When starting a new AI session, paste this file and say:

```
"Read the Indivio Master Context above. I need help with: [your task]"
```

The AI will have full project context — architecture, DB schema, screen map,
code patterns, naming conventions — and can generate correct code immediately
without re-explaining anything.

---

## 1. PROJECT IDENTITY

```
Product name:     Indivio Edtech
App name:         Indivio
Tagline:          Smart School Management
Type:             SaaS mobile app (Android + iOS)
Package:          com.indivio.indivio
Version:          1.0.0+1
Phase:            V1 — Student + Teacher + Parent app
Target users:     Students · Teachers · Parents
Institutions:     K-12 Schools · Coaching Centers (India)
Region:           India (Hindi + English bilingual)
Dev team size:    Solo developer
Timeline:         16 weeks (V1)
```

---

## 2. TECH STACK

```
Framework:        Flutter 3.x (Dart 3.x)
State mgmt:       flutter_riverpod 2.x + riverpod_annotation 2.x
Navigation:       go_router 14.x
Backend:          Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Storage, FCM)
Local dev DB:     JSON mock files in assets/mock_db/
Charts:           fl_chart 0.68.x
Calendar:         table_calendar 3.x
Files:            file_picker 8.x + image_picker 1.x
Images:           cached_network_image 3.x
Loading states:   shimmer 3.x
Utils:            intl 0.19.x · uuid 4.x · shared_preferences 2.x
Code gen:         build_runner + riverpod_generator
Linting:          flutter_lints + riverpod_lint + custom_lint
```

### pubspec.yaml dependencies (exact)
```yaml
dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  firebase_core: ^3.6.0
  firebase_auth: ^5.3.1
  cloud_firestore: ^5.4.4
  firebase_storage: ^12.3.3
  firebase_messaging: ^15.1.3
  flutter_riverpod: ^2.5.1
  riverpod_annotation: ^2.3.5
  go_router: ^14.3.0
  fl_chart: ^0.68.0
  table_calendar: ^3.1.2
  shimmer: ^3.0.0
  cached_network_image: ^3.4.1
  file_picker: ^8.1.2
  image_picker: ^1.1.2
  intl: ^0.19.0
  uuid: ^4.5.0
  shared_preferences: ^2.3.2

dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_lints: ^4.0.0
  build_runner: ^2.4.13
  riverpod_generator: ^2.4.3
  custom_lint: ^0.6.7
  riverpod_lint: ^2.3.13
```

---

## 3. ARCHITECTURE — ABSOLUTE RULES

### 3.1 Pattern: Feature-First Clean Architecture

Every feature lives in its own folder with 3 sub-layers:

```
features/{feature_name}/
  data/
    {feature}_repository.dart   ← ALL Firebase/JSON calls live here only
  domain/
    {feature}_model.dart        ← Dart model class with fromMap/toMap/copyWith
  presentation/
    screens/
      {feature}_screen.dart     ← Max 200 lines. Only calls providers.
    widgets/
      {widget_name}.dart        ← One widget per file. Max 150 lines.
    providers/
      {feature}_provider.dart   ← Riverpod providers. Calls repository only.
```

### 3.2 Non-Negotiable Rules

```
RULE 1  Max 300 lines per file. Split immediately if approaching.
RULE 2  Zero Firebase code in widgets or providers.
        All Firestore/Storage calls → repository files only.
RULE 3  One widget = one file. Extract every non-trivial widget.
RULE 4  GoRouter handles ALL navigation. Never use Navigator.push.
RULE 5  schoolId on EVERY Firestore document. Every query filters schoolId first.
RULE 6  All colors → AppColors. All text → AppTextStyles. All spacing → AppDimensions.
RULE 7  Const constructors wherever possible.
RULE 8  No print() — use debugPrint() only.
RULE 9  No dynamic types — use proper models.
RULE 10 FCM token saved on every login via NotificationService.
RULE 11 Riverpod providers per feature — no global god providers.
RULE 12 Repository pattern: every method has try/catch, throws typed Exception.
```

### 3.3 Code Generation Order (per feature)
```
1. domain/{feature}_model.dart
2. data/{feature}_repository.dart
3. presentation/providers/{feature}_provider.dart
4. presentation/screens/{feature}_screen.dart
5. presentation/widgets/{widget}.dart  (one per widget)
```

---

## 4. FOLDER STRUCTURE (complete)

```
lib/
├── main.dart
├── firebase_options.dart                    ← auto-generated by FlutterFire
```

## 5. DESIGN SYSTEM

### 5.1 Colors (AppColors)

```dart
// Brand
primary:       #4A3AFF   // Indigo
primaryLight:  #7B6EFF
primaryDark:   #2D1FDB
accent:        #FF6B35   // Coral
accentLight:   #FF9A6C

// Role accents (bottom nav, highlights per role)
studentBlue:   #185FA5
teacherPurple: #534AB7
parentTeal:    #0F6E56

// Semantic
success:  #00C48C
warning:  #FFA502
error:    #FF4757
info:     #1E90FF

// Attendance
present:  #00C48C
absent:   #FF4757
late:     #FFA502
onLeave:  #747D8C
holiday:  #DFE4EA

// Subject colors
math:    #185FA5    sci:   #3B6D11
english: #FF6B35    hindi: #BA7517
sst:     #534AB7    it:    #0F6E56
default: #888780

// Backgrounds
bgPrimary:   #FFFFFF    bgSecondary: #F5F5F7
bgTertiary:  #EEEEF2    bgCard:      #FFFFFF

// Text
textPrimary:   #1A1A2E
textSecondary: #6B7280
textTertiary:  #9CA3AF
textOnPrimary: #FFFFFF

// Border
borderLight:  #E5E7EB
borderMedium: #D1D5DB
divider:      #F3F4F6

// Fee status
feePaid:    #00C48C
feePending: #FFA502
feeOverdue: #FF4757
```

### 5.2 Typography (AppTextStyles, font: Inter)

```
display:    28px  w700  textPrimary   ls:-0.5
h1:         24px  w600  textPrimary   ls:-0.3
h2:         20px  w600  textPrimary
h3:         16px  w600  textPrimary
h4:         14px  w600  textPrimary
bodyLarge:  16px  w400  textPrimary   h:1.5
bodyMedium: 14px  w400  textPrimary   h:1.5
bodySmall:  12px  w400  textSecondary h:1.4
labelLarge: 14px  w500  textPrimary   ls:0.1
labelMedium:12px  w500  textPrimary   ls:0.2
labelSmall: 11px  w500  textSecondary ls:0.3
caption:    11px  w400  textTertiary  h:1.4
buttonLarge:16px  w600  textOnPrimary ls:0.3
metric:     22px  w700  textPrimary
navLabel:   10px  w500  ls:0.3
chip:       11px  w500  ls:0.2
```

### 5.3 Dimensions (AppDimensions)

```
Border radius:  XS=4  SM=8  MD=12  LG=16  XL=20  XXL=24  Full=999
Padding:        XS=4  SM=8  MD=12  LG=16  XL=20  XXL=24  Page=16
Gap:            XS=4  SM=8  MD=12  LG=16  XL=20  Section=24
Heights:        button=52  buttonSM=40  input=52  bottomNav=65  appBar=56
Icons:          XS=14  SM=16  MD=20  LG=24  XL=32
Avatar:         SM=32  MD=44  LG=64  XL=88
bottomNavIconSize: 22
```

### 5.4 Design Rules
```
- No shadows anywhere
- No gradients (UI elements)
- All cards: 0.5px borderLight border, radiusLG, bgCard
- All inputs: filled bgPrimary, radiusMD, 1.5px primary on focus
- Bottom nav: pill indicator, role color highlight, no shadow
- AppBar: bgPrimary, 0 elevation, 0.5px bottom border
- Scaffold background: bgSecondary (off-white)
- All buttons: radiusMD, full width by default
```

---

## 6. NAVIGATION STRUCTURE

### 6.1 GoRouter Route Map

```
/splash                    → SplashScreen
/login                     → LoginScreen

/student/home              → StudentHomeScreen      [StudentShell]
/student/classroom         → StudentClassroomScreen [StudentShell]
/student/account           → StudentAccountScreen   [StudentShell]
/student/attendance        → AttendanceCalendarScreen
/student/leave/apply       → ApplyLeaveScreen
/student/fees              → FeeDashboardScreen
/student/materials         → MaterialsScreen
/student/notices           → NoticesScreen
/student/assignment/:id    → AssignmentDetailScreen
/student/assignment/:id/submit → SubmitAssignmentScreen

/teacher/home              → TeacherHomeScreen      [TeacherShell]
/teacher/classroom         → TeacherClassroomScreen [TeacherShell]
/teacher/account           → TeacherAccountScreen   [TeacherShell]
/teacher/attendance/mark   → MarkAttendanceScreen
/teacher/homework/post     → PostHomeworkScreen
/teacher/assignment/create → CreateAssignmentScreen
/teacher/assignment/:id/grade → GradeSubmissionsScreen
/teacher/results/post      → PostTestResultScreen
/teacher/materials/upload  → UploadMaterialScreen

/parent/home               → ParentHomeScreen       [ParentShell]
/parent/academics          → ParentAcademicsScreen  [ParentShell]
/parent/account            → ParentAccountScreen    [ParentShell]
/parent/leave/apply        → ApplyLeaveScreen (parent version)
/parent/fees               → FeeDashboardScreen (parent view)
```

### 6.2 Role Detection Flow

```
Splash → Check Firebase Auth
  → Not logged in           → /login
  → Logged in               → fetch users/{uid}
      role == 'student'     → /student/home
      role == 'teacher'     → /teacher/home
      role == 'parent'      → /parent/home
```

### 6.3 Bottom Nav per Role

```
Student:  Home(home_rounded) · Classroom(menu_book_rounded) · Account(person_rounded)
          roleColor: studentBlue (#185FA5)

Teacher:  Home(home_rounded) · My Class(class__rounded) · Account(person_rounded)
          roleColor: teacherPurple (#534AB7)

Parent:   Overview(home_rounded) · Academics(school_rounded) · Account(person_rounded)
          roleColor: parentTeal (#0F6E56)
```

---

## 7. SCREEN MAP (all 32 screens)

### Student (13 screens)
```
1.  splash_screen.dart           — Animated logo, auto-navigate by role
2.  login_screen.dart            — Phone/OTP auth + role selection (dev: role cards)
3.  student_home_screen.dart     — 8 widget composition screen
4.  attendance_calendar_screen.dart — Full monthly calendar, leave history
5.  apply_leave_screen.dart      — Leave form, date picker, reason, track status
6.  fee_dashboard_screen.dart    — Dues list, payment history, Pay Now CTA
7.  student_classroom_screen.dart — 6 widget composition screen
8.  homework_detail_screen.dart  — Subject HW, files, mark seen
9.  assignment_detail_screen.dart — Instructions, marks, deadline
10. submit_assignment_screen.dart — File upload + text submission
11. test_results_screen.dart     — Bar chart, subject scores, rank
12. materials_screen.dart        — Subject folders, PDF viewer
13. student_account_screen.dart  — Profile, settings, logout
```

### Teacher (11 screens)
```
14. teacher_home_screen.dart     — Today's periods, pending tasks, notices
15. mark_attendance_screen.dart  — Student list, P/A/L/Late toggles, bulk submit
16. attendance_history_screen.dart — Class calendar, per-student stats
17. teacher_classroom_screen.dart — Subject cards, HW mgmt, assignment mgmt
18. post_homework_screen.dart    — Title, subject, due date, file attach
19. create_assignment_screen.dart — Marks, instructions, deadline, files
20. grade_submissions_screen.dart — Student list, view file, enter marks, feedback
21. post_test_results_screen.dart — Marks per student, publish
22. upload_material_screen.dart  — Subject, type, file, description
23. teacher_notices_screen.dart  — Post + view school/class announcements
24. teacher_account_screen.dart  — Profile, subjects, settings
```

### Parent (8 screens)
```
25. parent_home_screen.dart      — Child today status, fee alert, notices
26. parent_attendance_screen.dart — Child attendance calendar (read-only)
27. parent_apply_leave_screen.dart — On-behalf leave for child
28. parent_academics_screen.dart — HW, assignments, test results view
29. fee_payment_screen.dart      — Outstanding dues, pay online, receipts
30. parent_notices_screen.dart   — School + class announcements
31. parent_account_screen.dart   — Profile, child switcher, settings
32. notice_detail_screen.dart    — Full announcement view (shared all roles)
```

---

## 8. STUDENT HOME SCREEN — WIDGET BREAKDOWN

File: `features/student/home/screens/student_home_screen.dart`
Composed of 8 widgets from `features/student/home/widgets/`:

```
Widget 1: today_status_banner.dart
  - Full width card, color based on status
  - Present=success bg · Absent=error bg · Late=warning bg · Holiday=holiday bg
  - Shows: status label, check-in time (if present), date
  - Data: attendance.getTodayStatus(studentId)

Widget 2: schedule_strip.dart
  - Horizontal ScrollView of period cards
  - Each card: period number, subject name (colored), teacher name, time
  - Current period highlighted with primary border
  - Data: timetable.getTodaySchedule(dayName)

Widget 3: quick_stats_row.dart
  - Row of 3 metric cards (bgSecondary, radiusMD, no border)
  - Card 1: attendance % this month (success color if >85, warning if 75-85, error if <75)
  - Card 2: pending assignments count (badge style)
  - Card 3: next fee due date (red if overdue, amber if <7 days)
  - Data: attendance summary + assignments + fees

Widget 4: attendance_calendar_widget.dart
  - table_calendar compact inline view
  - 5 weeks visible, dot markers per day: P=success · A=error · L=onLeave · H=holiday
  - Tap day → opens attendance_calendar_screen.dart
  - Below calendar: "Present: X · Absent: X · This month" summary row

Widget 5: homework_today_widget.dart
  - "Due Today" section header with count badge
  - Collapsible list of today's homework items
  - Each item: colored subject indicator strip + subject name + title + due time
  - "No homework today 🎉" empty state if none
  - Data: homework filtered by dueDate == today

Widget 6: fee_alert_card.dart
  - CONDITIONAL: only shown if status == 'pending' or 'overdue'
  - Warning banner: amount, due date, "Pay Now" button (→ fee_dashboard_screen)
  - Overdue: error color scheme with late fine amount shown
  - Hidden completely if all fees paid

Widget 7: announcements_feed.dart
  - Section header "Notices" with "See All" link
  - Latest 3 announcements as cards
  - Each: category chip (exam/event/fee/holiday), title, created-by, time ago
  - Unread blue dot on left
  - Tap → notice_detail_screen.dart

Widget 8: leave_status_widget.dart
  - CONDITIONAL: only shown if leave is pending or active
  - Status pill: "Leave Pending" (warning) or "Leave Approved" (success)
  - Shows: date range, reason, status
  - Hidden if no active leave application
```

---

## 9. STUDENT CLASSROOM SCREEN — WIDGET BREAKDOWN

File: `features/student/classroom/screens/student_classroom_screen.dart`
Composed of 6 widgets from `features/student/classroom/widgets/`:

```
Widget 1: class_identity_card.dart
  - Prominent card at top
  - Roll no pill + Class name (large) + Section badge
  - Class teacher name + Academic year + Board badge
  - Tap card → timetable view

Widget 2: homework_section.dart
  - Subject-wise homework cards in ListView
  - Each card: left colored bar (subject color), subject icon, title, due date
  - Attachment indicator (📎) if files exist
  - Two tabs: "Today" and "Upcoming"
  - Tap → homework_detail_screen.dart

Widget 3: assignments_section.dart
  - TabBar: Pending | Submitted | Graded (with count badges)
  - Pending: deadline countdown chip, subject, title, marks total, Submit button
  - Submitted: submitted time, "Awaiting grade" chip
  - Graded: marks obtained/total, grade badge, feedback preview
  - Tap → assignment_detail_screen.dart

Widget 4: test_performance_widget.dart
  - Section header with "View All" link
  - Horizontal bar chart (fl_chart) — subject on Y, score % on X
  - Each bar colored with subject color
  - Class average shown as dashed vertical line
  - Rank badge: "Rank X in class"

Widget 5: study_materials_widget.dart
  - Subject folder grid (2 columns)
  - Each folder: subject color icon, name, file count
  - Tap folder → filtered list of files
  - File item: type icon (pdf/video/doc), title, size, upload date

Widget 6: syllabus_tracker_widget.dart
  - Per-subject linear progress bars
  - Subject name + "X/Y chapters" + percentage
  - Progress bar color = subject color
  - "X chapters remaining" label
```

---

## 10. FIREBASE FIRESTORE SCHEMA

### Collection: schools/{schoolId}
```json
{
  "schoolId": "SCH001",
  "name": "Saraswati Vidya Mandir",
  "shortName": "SVM",
  "type": "K-12",
  "board": "CBSE",
  "udiseCode": "09040112345",
  "affiliationNumber": "2130045",
  "logo": "https://storage.../logo.png",
  "address": { "line1", "city", "district", "state", "pincode" },
  "contact": { "phone", "email", "website", "whatsapp" },
  "principal": { "name", "phone", "email", "photoUrl" },
  "academicYear": { "current": "2024-25", "startDate", "endDate" },
  "workingDays": { "monday": true, ... "sunday": false },
  "timings": { "schoolStart": "07:30", "schoolEnd": "13:30" },
  "saas": { "plan", "maxStudents", "featuresEnabled[]", "adminUid" },
  "createdAt": "Timestamp"
}
```

### Collection: users/{uid}
```json
{
  "uid": "UID_STU001",
  "name": "Aarav Singh Rajput",
  "email": "aarav@gmail.com",
  "phone": "+91-9876511001",
  "role": "student",
  "schoolId": "SCH001",
  "photoUrl": "https://...",
  "fcmToken": "FCM_TOKEN_...",
  "createdAt": "Timestamp"
}
```

### Collection: students/{studentId}
```json
{
  "studentId": "STU001",
  "schoolId": "SCH001",
  "userId": "UID_STU001",
  "classId": "CLS_10A",
  "rollNumber": "01",
  "admissionNumber": "SVM-2019-0421",
  "srNumber": "SR-7821",
  "section": "A",
  "academicYear": "2024-25",
  "board": "CBSE",
  "personal": {
    "fullName": "Aarav Singh Rajput",
    "dob": "2008-03-15",
    "gender": "Male",
    "bloodGroup": "B+",
    "category": "General",
    "photoUrl": "https://..."
  },

    "email": "aarav@gmail.com"
  },
  "parentIds": ["PAR001", "PAR002"],
  "transport": { "usesTransport": true, "busRouteNumber", "busStopName" },
  "health": { "bloodGroup", "allergies[]", "medicalConditions[]" },
  "fees": { "feeCategory", "concession": false, "concessionType": null },
  "createdAt": "Timestamp"
}
```
**Firestore query keys** (compound indexed):
- `schoolId + userId` — login lookup
- `schoolId + admissionNumber` — admin lookup
- `schoolId + classId` — class roster

---

## 11. FIRESTORE RULES SUMMARY

```
students:    read if same school + (own student OR teacher OR parent of student)
teachers:    read if same school
attendance:  read all same school · write teachers only (own classId)
homework:    read all same school · write teachers only
assignments: read all same school · write teachers only
submissions: read own student + teacher · create student · update teacher (grade)
tests:       read all same school · write teachers only
fees:        read own student + parent + teacher · write admin only
leaves:      read own student + teacher + parent · create student/parent · update teacher
notices:     read all same school · write teachers + admin
materials:   read all same school · write teachers only
```

---

## 12. REQUIRED FIRESTORE COMPOSITE INDEXES

```
Collection          Fields                          Order
students            schoolId + userId               ASC + ASC
students            schoolId + classId              ASC + ASC
students            schoolId + admissionNumber      ASC + ASC
attendance (path)   schoolId + classId + date       Path-based
homework            schoolId + classId + dueDate    ASC + ASC + ASC
assignments         schoolId + classId + dueDate    ASC + ASC + ASC
submissions         assignmentId + studentId        ASC + ASC
submissions         assignmentId + status           ASC + ASC
tests               schoolId + classId + date       ASC + ASC + DESC
fees                schoolId + studentId + status   ASC + ASC + ASC
leaves              schoolId + studentId + status   ASC + ASC + ASC
announcements       schoolId + createdAt            ASC + DESC
materials           schoolId + classId + subjectId  ASC + ASC + ASC
```

---

## 14. CODE PATTERNS — COPY EXACTLY

### Model pattern
```dart
class AttendanceModel {
  final String studentId;
  final String status;   // 'P' | 'A' | 'L' | 'Late'
  final String markedBy;
  final DateTime markedAt;
  final String? remarks;

  const AttendanceModel({
    required this.studentId,
    required this.status,
    required this.markedBy,
    required this.markedAt,
    this.remarks,
  });

  factory AttendanceModel.fromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
    return AttendanceModel(
      studentId: map['studentId'] as String,
      status: map['status'] as String? ?? 'A',
      markedBy: map['markedBy'] as String,
      markedAt: (map['markedAt'] as Timestamp).toDate(),
      remarks: map['remarks'] as String?,
    );
  }

  Map<String, dynamic> toMap() => {
    'studentId': studentId,
    'status': status,
    'markedBy': markedBy,
    'markedAt': Timestamp.fromDate(markedAt),
    'remarks': remarks,
  };

  AttendanceModel copyWith({
    String? studentId, String? status, String? markedBy,
    DateTime? markedAt, String? remarks,
  }) => AttendanceModel(
    studentId: studentId ?? this.studentId,
    status: status ?? this.status,
    markedBy: markedBy ?? this.markedBy,
    markedAt: markedAt ?? this.markedAt,
    remarks: remarks ?? this.remarks,
  );
}
```

### Repository pattern
```dart
class AttendanceRepository {
  final FirebaseFirestore _firestore = FirebaseFirestore.instance;

  // ALWAYS filter by schoolId first
  Future<AttendanceModel?> getTodayAttendance({
    required String schoolId,
    required String classId,
    required String studentId,
    required String date,  // format: 'YYYY-MM-DD'
  }) async {
    try {
      final doc = await _firestore
          .collection('attendance')
          .doc(schoolId)
          .collection(date)
          .doc(classId)
          .collection('students')
          .doc(studentId)
          .get();
      if (!doc.exists || doc.data() == null) return null;
      return AttendanceModel.fromMap({...doc.data()!, 'studentId': studentId});
    } catch (e) {
      throw Exception('AttendanceRepository.getTodayAttendance failed: $e');
    }
  }

  Stream<List<AttendanceModel>> getMonthlyAttendance({
    required String schoolId,
    required String classId,
    required String studentId,
    required int month,
    required int year,
  }) {
    // Build date range for the month
    // Return stream of attendance records
    throw UnimplementedError('Implement month range query');
  }
}
```

### Riverpod provider pattern
```dart
// FutureProvider for one-time data fetch
final todayAttendanceProvider = FutureProvider.family<AttendanceModel?, TodayAttendanceParams>(
  (ref, params) async {
    final repo = ref.watch(attendanceRepositoryProvider);
    return repo.getTodayAttendance(
      schoolId: params.schoolId,
      classId: params.classId,
      studentId: params.studentId,
      date: params.date,
    );
  },
);

// Repository provider
final attendanceRepositoryProvider = Provider<AttendanceRepository>(
  (ref) => AttendanceRepository(),
);
```

### UI pattern (always handle 3 states)
```dart
ref.watch(todayAttendanceProvider(params)).when(
  loading: () => const ShimmerBox(height: 80, width: double.infinity),
  error: (error, _) => EmptyStateWidget(
    icon: Icons.error_outline,
    title: 'Could not load attendance',
    subtitle: error.toString(),
    actionLabel: 'Retry',
    onAction: () => ref.invalidate(todayAttendanceProvider),
  ),
  data: (attendance) => TodayStatusBanner(attendance: attendance),
);
```

## 15. DEVELOPMENT PHASES

### Phase 1 — Foundation (Weeks 1–3) ← CURRENT
```
✅ Flutter project setup
✅ Firebase configuration
✅ Folder structure
✅ Mock DB JSON files
✅ Core constants (colors, text, dimensions, strings)
✅ App theme (Material 3)
✅ GoRouter + Shell widgets (bottom nav)
✅ Placeholder screens (all 9)
✅ Splash + Login screens
✅ MockDataService
□  NotificationService (FCM token)
□  Auth providers (Riverpod)
□  User model
```

### Phase 2 — Student App (Weeks 4–7)
```
□  Student Home Screen — all 8 widgets
□  Attendance Calendar Screen
□  Leave Apply Screen + Flow
□  Fee Dashboard Screen
□  Student Classroom Screen — all 6 widgets
□  Homework Detail Screen
□  Assignment Detail + Submit Screen
□  Test Results Screen (fl_chart)
□  Study Materials Screen
□  Student Account Screen
```

### Phase 3 — Teacher App (Weeks 8–11)
```
□  Teacher Home Dashboard
□  Mark Attendance Screen
□  Post Homework Screen
□  Create Assignment Screen
□  Grade Submissions Screen
□  Post Test Results Screen
□  Upload Materials Screen
□  Teacher Account Screen
```

### Phase 4 — Parent + Features (Weeks 12–14)
```
□  Full Parent App (8 screens)
□  FCM Push Notifications (all roles)
□  Leave approval flow (teacher side)
□  Multi-child switcher (parent)
□  Fee payment integration (Razorpay/UPI)
□  Shimmer loading states (all screens)
□  Error states (all screens)
```

### Phase 5 — QA + Launch (Weeks 15–16)
```
□  Firebase security rules (production)
□  Firestore indexes
□  Performance testing
□  UI/UX polish pass
□  Beta testing with 1 school
□  Play Store / App Store submission
```

## 16. SCHOOL CONTEXT (mock data)

```
School:          Saraswati Vidya Mandir (SVM)
Location:        Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India
Board:           CBSE
Established:     1994
UDISE Code:      09040112345
Principal:       Dr. Anjali Srivastava
Working days:    Monday–Saturday
School timings:  07:30 AM – 01:30 PM
Total students:  1,240
Total teachers:  52
Medium:          Hindi + English

Academic year:   2024-25 (April 2024 – March 2025)
Current class:   Class 10-A (42 students)
Class teacher:   Mr. Rakesh Kumar Sharma (Mathematics)

Indian school specifics:
- Quarterly fee structure (Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4)
- Late fee after due date (₹200)
- OBC/SC/ST/General fee categories
- Concessions for BPL/scholarship students
- Board: CBSE (national curriculum)
- Subjects follow NCERT syllabus
- Hindi is a mandatory subject
- School includes Saturday
- Holidays: Diwali, Holi, Eid, Guru Nanak Jayanti, Republic/Independence Day
- Attendance critical: 75% minimum required by CBSE
```

---

## 17. SAAS ARCHITECTURE NOTES

```
Multi-tenancy model:
- One Firebase project for all schools
- schoolId on EVERY document — this is the tenant separator
- Security rules enforce schoolId scoping
- Storage paths: gs://indivio/{schoolId}/...

Data isolation:
- Student A from School X cannot see School Y data
- Teachers can only mark attendance for their assigned classIds
- Parents can only see their child's data

Scalability:
- Firestore collections are flat (not nested under school)
- schoolId + other field = all composite indexes
- Attendance uses date-based document paths for efficient range queries

Future multi-school dashboard:
- Same Firebase project
- Admin role gets cross-schoolId read access
- School admin sees only their schoolId
```

---

## 19. FIREBASE SWITCH CHECKLIST
> When ready to move from mock JSON to live Firebase

```
□  Replace MockDataService.getXxx() calls with XxxRepository.getXxx()
□  All model fromMap() methods handle Timestamp type (not String)
□  All schoolId fields populated on every write operation
□  Firebase Security Rules deployed and tested
□  All Firestore composite indexes created in console
□  FCM working — tokens saved on login
□  Storage rules set for uploads (assignments, materials, profile photos)
□  Firebase App Check enabled (production)
□  Error monitoring: Firebase Crashlytics integrated
□  Analytics: Firebase Analytics events added for key actions
```

---

## 20. COPILOT USAGE STRATEGY

```
GPT-5 mini (0x cost) — default for:
  - Widget generation (cards, tiles, list items)
  - Dart model classes from JSON
  - Riverpod provider boilerplate
  - GoRouter route additions
  - copyWith/toMap/fromMap methods
  - Placeholder screens

Grok Code Fast (0.25x) — switch for:
  - Debugging Firestore query errors
  - Flutter layout overflow fixes
  - Refactoring large widgets into smaller ones
  - Converting setState to Riverpod

Claude Haiku (0.33x) — switch for:
  - Generating all repository files from a template
  - Writing shimmer skeleton widgets for every screen
  - Batch error handling across files

GPT-5.1/5.2-Codex (1x) — switch for:
  - Firebase Security Rules
  - Complex state machine logic (assignment submission flow)
  - Multi-child parent auth state
  - Performance-critical Firestore queries

Gemini 2.5 Pro (1x) — switch for:
  - Full feature folder review (paste 3+ files)
  - Architecture violation check
  - Cross-feature dependency analysis

NEVER use preview models (GPT-5.4 mini, Gemini 3 Flash) in production code.
```
